member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoAuthenticationProvider
member.summary:
HMAC-SHA256 authentication for the Bitvavo REST API.
The signature input concatenates the millisecond-timestamp, HTTP method (uppercase), the path (including /v2 prefix and any query string) and the JSON-encoded body (empty string for GET requests). The result is the lowercase hex HMAC-SHA256 of that string with the API secret as key. See .

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials
member.summary: Bitvavo API credentials

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials.#ctor
member.summary: Create new credentials

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials.#ctor(CryptoExchange.Net.Authentication.HMACCredential)
member.summary: Create new credentials providing HMAC credentials

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create new credentials providing credentials in HMAC format

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials.WithHMAC(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Specify the HMAC credentials

member.summary: Exchange Socket API address (wss://ws.bitvavo.com/v2/)

member.summary: Market Data Pro Socket API address (wss://ws-mdpro.bitvavo.com/v2/)

member.summary: ctor for DI, use for creating a custom environment

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoEnvironment.Live
member.summary: Live environment

member.summary: Create a custom environment

member.summary: Bitvavo error code mappings.

member.summary: Bitvavo exchange information and configuration

member.summary: Exchange name

member.summary: Display name

member.summary: Url to exchange image

member.summary: Url to the main website

member.summary: Urls to the API documentation

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoExchange.Type
member.summary: Type of exchange

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoExchange.AssetAliases
member.summary: Aliases for Bitvavo assets

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoExchange.FormatSymbol(System.String,System.String,CryptoExchange.Net.SharedApis.TradingMode,System.Nullable{System.DateTime})
member.summary: Format a base and quote asset to a Bitvavo recognized symbol (BASE-QUOTE)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoExchange.RateLimiter
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Bitvavo API

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoRateLimiters
member.summary: Rate limiter configuration for the Bitvavo API. All limits are sourced from .

member.name: E:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoRateLimiters.RateLimitTriggered
member.summary: Event for when a rate limit is triggered

member.name: E:Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoRateLimiters.RateLimitUpdated
member.summary: Event when the rate limit is updated. Note that it's only updated when a request is send, so there are no specific updates when the current usage is decaying.

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Clients.BitvavoRestClient.#ctor(System.Action{Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoRestOptions})
member.summary: Create a new instance of the BitvavoRestClient using provided options

member.param: Options to use for created clients

member.summary: ctor

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Clients.ExchangeSocketApi.BitvavoSocketClientExchangeApi.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoSocketOptions)
member.summary: Create a new instance of BitvavoSocketClientExchangeApi

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Clients.MarketDataProSocketApi.BitvavoSocketClientMarketDataProApi.#ctor(Microsoft.Extensions.Logging.ILogger,Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoSocketOptions)
member.summary: Create a new instance of BitvavoSocketClientMarketDataProApi

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Clients.MessageHandlers.BitvavoSocketMessageHandler
member.summary: Routes incoming websocket messages to the right query/subscription. Subscribe/unsubscribe responses are correlated by the echoed requestId; live data events are routed by event + per-message topic (e.g. market for trade updates).

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.AssetStatus
member.summary: Deposit/withdrawal status for a Bitvavo asset.

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.AssetStatus.Ok
member.summary: ["OK"] Deposits/withdrawals are enabled

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.AssetStatus.Maintenance
member.summary: ["MAINTENANCE"] Asset network is under maintenance

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.AssetStatus.Delisted
member.summary: ["DELISTED"] Asset has been delisted

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.MarketStatus
member.summary: Market trading status as returned by the Bitvavo /markets endpoint.

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.MarketStatus.Trading
member.summary: ["trading"] Market is trading normally

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.MarketStatus.Halted
member.summary: ["halted"] Trading on this market has been halted

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.MarketStatus.Auction
member.summary: ["auction"] Market is in auction mode

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.OrderSide
member.summary: Order side

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.OrderSide.Buy
member.summary: ["buy"] Buy

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Enums.OrderSide.Sell
member.summary: ["sell"] Sell

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeSocketApi.IBitvavoSocketClientExchangeApi
member.summary: Bitvavo Exchange Socket API streams (wss://ws.bitvavo.com/v2/).

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeSocketApi.IBitvavoSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Subscribe to the public trade stream for a market.
Docs:
Channel: trades
member.param: Cancellation token for closing this subscription

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.ExchangeSocketApi.IBitvavoSocketClientExchangeApi.SubscribeToTicker24hUpdatesAsync(System.String[],System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTicker24hUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Subscribe to the rolling 24h ticker stream for one or more markets.
Docs:
Channel: ticker24h
member.param: Markets to subscribe to (for example BTC-EUR)
Ticker event handler. The exchange may batch multiple markets into a single update.
Cancellation token for closing this subscription

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoRestClient
member.summary: Client for accessing the Bitvavo REST API.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoRestClient.SpotApi
member.summary: Spot API endpoints

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoSocketClient
member.summary:
Client for accessing the Bitvavo websocket APIs.
Bitvavo offers two distinct websocket APIs - the regular Exchange Socket API and the low-latency Market Data Pro Socket API - exposed via and .

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoSocketClient.ExchangeApi
member.summary: Exchange Socket API streams (wss://ws.bitvavo.com/v2/)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoSocketClient.MarketDataProApi
member.summary: Market Data Pro Socket API streams (wss://ws-mdpro.bitvavo.com/v2/)

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoUserClientProvider
member.summary: Provider for clients with credentials for specific users

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoUserClientProvider.InitializeUserClient(System.String,Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials,Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoEnvironment)
member.summary: Initialize a client for the specified user identifier. This can be used so to initialize a client for a user so ApiCredentials do not need to be passed later.

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoUserClientProvider.ClearUserClients(System.String)
member.summary: Reset the cached clients for a user. This can be useful when a user changes API credentials.

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoUserClientProvider.GetRestClient(System.String,Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials,Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Rest client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.IBitvavoUserClientProvider.GetSocketClient(System.String,Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoCredentials,Bitvavo.Net.BitvavoEnvironment)
member.summary: Get the Socket client for a specific user. In case the client does not exist yet it will be created and the should be provided, unless has been called prior for this user.
member.param: The credentials for the user. Required the first time a client is requested for this user unless has been called prior for this user.

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.MarketDataProSocketApi.IBitvavoSocketClientMarketDataProApi
member.summary:
Bitvavo Market Data Pro Socket API streams (wss://ws-mdpro.bitvavo.com/v2/).
Provides low-latency, full-fidelity market data with sequence-numbered events.

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.MarketDataProSocketApi.IBitvavoSocketClientMarketDataProApi.SubscribeToTradeUpdatesAsync(System.String,System.Action{CryptoExchange.Net.Objects.Sockets.DataEvent{Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Subscribe to the public trade stream for a market via Market Data Pro.
Docs:
Channel: trades
member.param: Cancellation token for closing this subscription

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApi
member.summary: Bitvavo Spot API endpoints

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApi.ExchangeData
member.summary: Endpoints related to retrieving market and system data

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData
member.summary: Bitvavo Spot exchange data endpoints. Exchange data includes market data (tickers, order books, etc.) and system status.

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetServerTimeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get the current Bitvavo server time.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/time

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetMarketsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get all trading markets, including their status, base/quote and trade limits.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/markets

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetAssetsAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get all assets known to the exchange, including supported networks.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/assets

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickers24hAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get rolling 24h ticker statistics for ALL markets.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/ticker/24h

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTicker24hAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get rolling 24h ticker statistics for a single market. Bitvavo returns a SINGLE object (not an array of one) when the market query parameter is supplied.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/ticker/24h?market={market}

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickerPricesAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get the latest price for ALL markets.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/ticker/price

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickerPriceAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get the latest price for a single market. Bitvavo returns a SINGLE object (not an array of one) when the market query parameter is supplied.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/ticker/price?market={market}

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickerBooksAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get the best bid/ask snapshot for ALL markets.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/ticker/book

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetTickerBookAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get the best bid/ask snapshot for a single market. Bitvavo returns a SINGLE object (not an array of one) when the market query parameter is supplied.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/ticker/book?market={market}

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Interfaces.Clients.SpotApi.IBitvavoRestClientSpotApiExchangeData.GetRecentTradesAsync(System.String,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary:
Get recent public trades for a market.
Docs:
Endpoint:
GET /v2/{market}/trades

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.BitvavoApiAddresses
member.summary: Api addresses usable for the Bitvavo clients

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.BitvavoApiAddresses.RestClientAddress
member.summary: The address used by the BitvavoRestClient for the rest API

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.BitvavoApiAddresses.SocketExchangeClientAddress
member.summary: The address used by the BitvavoSocketClient for the Exchange Socket API

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.BitvavoApiAddresses.SocketMarketDataProClientAddress
member.summary: The address used by the BitvavoSocketClient for the Market Data Pro Socket API

member.name: F:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.BitvavoApiAddresses.Default
member.summary: The default addresses to connect to the Bitvavo API

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset
member.summary: Asset info as returned by Bitvavo GET /v2/assets

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.Symbol
member.summary: ["symbol"] Asset short name (for example BTC)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.Name
member.summary: ["name"] Display name (for example Bitcoin)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.Decimals
member.summary: ["decimals"] Number of decimals supported for this asset

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.DepositFee
member.summary: ["depositFee"] Deposit fee

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.DepositConfirmations
member.summary: ["depositConfirmations"] Confirmations required for a deposit to be credited

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.DepositStatus
member.summary: ["depositStatus"] Current deposit status of the asset

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.WithdrawalFee
member.summary: ["withdrawalFee"] Withdrawal fee

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.WithdrawalMinAmount
member.summary: ["withdrawalMinAmount"] Minimum withdrawal amount

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.WithdrawalStatus
member.summary: ["withdrawalStatus"] Current withdrawal status of the asset

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.Networks
member.summary: ["networks"] List of networks the asset is supported on

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoAsset.Message
member.summary: ["message"] Optional message regarding the current status of the asset

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket
member.summary: Trading market info as returned by Bitvavo GET /v2/markets

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.Market
member.summary: ["market"] Market name, formatted as BASE-QUOTE (for example BTC-EUR)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.Status
member.summary: ["status"] Market trading status

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.BaseAsset
member.summary: ["base"] Base asset symbol

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.QuoteAsset
member.summary: ["quote"] Quote asset symbol

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.PricePrecision
member.summary: ["pricePrecision"] Number of significant digits used for the price. May return null after the migration to tick-size validation.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.MinOrderInBaseAsset
member.summary: ["minOrderInBaseAsset"] Minimum order quantity expressed in the base asset

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.MinOrderInQuoteAsset
member.summary: ["minOrderInQuoteAsset"] Minimum order value expressed in the quote asset

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoMarket.OrderTypes
member.summary: ["orderTypes"] Supported order types for this market

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoPublicTrade
member.summary: Public trade entry as returned by Bitvavo GET /v2/{market}/trades

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoPublicTrade.Id
member.summary: ["id"] Trade id

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoPublicTrade.Timestamp
member.summary: ["timestamp"] Trade timestamp

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoPublicTrade.Amount
member.summary: ["amount"] Trade quantity in base asset

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoPublicTrade.Price
member.summary: ["price"] Trade price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoPublicTrade.Side
member.summary: ["side"] Aggressor side (the side of the taker order)

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoServerTime
member.summary: Server time response (Bitvavo GET /v2/time)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoServerTime.Time
member.summary: ["time"] Current server timestamp

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h
member.summary: 24h rolling ticker statistics as returned by Bitvavo GET /v2/ticker/24h and the websocket ticker24h channel.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Market
member.summary: ["market"] Market name (for example BTC-EUR)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Open
member.summary: ["open"] Open price for the rolling 24h window

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.High
member.summary: ["high"] High price for the rolling 24h window

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Low
member.summary: ["low"] Low price for the rolling 24h window

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Last
member.summary: ["last"] Last trade price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Volume
member.summary: ["volume"] Volume in base asset over the rolling 24h window

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.VolumeQuote
member.summary: ["volumeQuote"] Volume in quote asset over the rolling 24h window

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Bid
member.summary: ["bid"] Best bid price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.BidSize
member.summary: ["bidSize"] Best bid size

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Ask
member.summary: ["ask"] Best ask price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.AskSize
member.summary: ["askSize"] Best ask size

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTicker24h.Timestamp
member.summary: ["timestamp"] Timestamp of the snapshot

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerBook
member.summary: Best bid/ask snapshot as returned by Bitvavo GET /v2/ticker/book

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerBook.Market
member.summary: ["market"] Market name (for example BTC-EUR)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerBook.Bid
member.summary: ["bid"] Best bid price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerBook.BidSize
member.summary: ["bidSize"] Size at the best bid

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerBook.Ask
member.summary: ["ask"] Best ask price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerBook.AskSize
member.summary: ["askSize"] Size at the best ask

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerPrice
member.summary: Last price for a market as returned by Bitvavo GET /v2/ticker/price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerPrice.Market
member.summary: ["market"] Market name (for example BTC-EUR)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.BitvavoTickerPrice.Price
member.summary: ["price"] Last trade price

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSocketRequest
member.summary: Subscribe/unsubscribe request payload for the Bitvavo websocket APIs.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSocketRequest.Action
member.summary: ["action"] Action name, either subscribe or unsubscribe.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSocketRequest.RequestId
member.summary: ["requestId"] Client-supplied id; Bitvavo echoes it back in both the success ({"event":"subscribed","requestId":...}) and error ({"action":"subscribe","requestId":...,"errorCode":...}) response. Used by the framework's routing layer to match a response back to its originating query when several requests share a single websocket connection.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSocketRequest.Channels
member.summary: ["channels"] Channels to subscribe or unsubscribe from.

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionChannel
member.summary: Single channel inside a Bitvavo subscribe/unsubscribe request.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionChannel.Name
member.summary: ["name"] Channel name (for example trades, ticker24h, book).

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionChannel.Markets
member.summary: ["markets"] Markets to subscribe to (for example BTC-EUR).

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionResponse
member.summary:
Response payload returned by the Bitvavo websocket server to a subscribe/unsubscribe request.
Bitvavo replies with one of two shapes:
1) Success: {"event":"subscribed","requestId":42,"subscriptions":{"trades":["BTC-EUR"]}} (or "unsubscribed" for an unsubscribe).
2) Failure: {"action":"subscribe","requestId":42,"errorCode":205,"error":"market parameter UNK-NOWN is invalid."}.
Both shapes carry the client-supplied requestId, which is what the framework uses to match a response to its originating .

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionResponse.Event
member.summary: ["event"] Set to subscribed or unsubscribed on success, absent on errors.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionResponse.Action
member.summary: ["action"] Set to subscribe or unsubscribe on action-scoped errors, absent on success.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionResponse.RequestId
member.summary: ["requestId"] Echo of the client-supplied request id.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionResponse.ErrorCode
member.summary: ["errorCode"] Numeric error code (only present on failure).

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoSubscriptionResponse.Error
member.summary: ["error"] Human readable error message (only present on failure).

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTicker24hUpdate
member.summary: 24h ticker update envelope from the Bitvavo ticker24h websocket subscription. The exchange batches updates for one or more markets in .

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTicker24hUpdate.Event
member.summary: ["event"] Event identifier, always ticker24h

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTicker24hUpdate.Data
member.summary: ["data"] One or more entries, one per affected market

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate
member.summary: Trade update message received from the Bitvavo trades websocket subscription.

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate.Event
member.summary: ["event"] Event identifier, always trade

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate.Market
member.summary: ["market"] Market name (for example BTC-EUR)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate.Id
member.summary: ["id"] Trade id

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate.Timestamp
member.summary: ["timestamp"] Trade timestamp

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate.Amount
member.summary: ["amount"] Trade quantity in base asset

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate.Price
member.summary: ["price"] Trade price

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Models.Socket.BitvavoTradeUpdate.Side
member.summary: ["side"] Aggressor side (taker side)

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoOptions
member.summary: Bitvavo options

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoRestOptions
member.summary: Options for the BitvavoRestClient

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoRestOptions.Default
member.summary: Default options for the BitvavoRestClient

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoRestOptions.#ctor
member.summary: ctor

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoRestOptions.ApiOptions
member.summary: Options for the Exchange API

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoSocketOptions
member.summary:
Options for the BitvavoSocketClient.
Bitvavo exposes two distinct websocket APIs - the regular Exchange Socket API and the low-latency Market Data Pro Socket API. The same socket client connects to both via independent api-clients, configured through and .

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoSocketOptions.Default
member.summary: Default options for the BitvavoSocketClient

member.name: M:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoSocketOptions.#ctor
member.summary: ctor

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoSocketOptions.ExchangeOptions
member.summary: Options for the Exchange Socket API (wss://ws.bitvavo.com/v2/)

member.name: P:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoSocketOptions.MarketDataProOptions
member.summary: Options for the Market Data Pro Socket API (wss://ws-mdpro.bitvavo.com/v2/)

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Sockets.BitvavoQuery
member.summary:
Subscribe/unsubscribe query for the Bitvavo websocket API.
Bitvavo replies to a subscribe/unsubscribe with either:
a success event - {"event":"subscribed","requestId":N,...} or {"event":"unsubscribed","requestId":N,...}; or
an action-scoped error - {"action":"subscribe","requestId":N,"errorCode":...,"error":"..."}.
Both shapes echo the client-supplied requestId; this query assigns a fresh id on construction and routes by it, so concurrent subscribes on a single connection are disambiguated. The ack is consumed silently on success and surfaced as a on failure.

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Sockets.BitvavoTicker24hSubscription
member.summary: Subscription for the Bitvavo ticker24h websocket channel covering one or more markets.

member.name: T:Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Sockets.BitvavoTradeSubscription
member.summary: Subscription for the Bitvavo public trades websocket channel.

member.name: T:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions
member.summary: Extensions for DI

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBitvavo(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration)
member.summary: Add services such as the IBitvavoRestClient and IBitvavoSocketClient. Configures the services based on the provided configuration.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.ServiceCollectionExtensions.AddBitvavo(Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection.IServiceCollection,System.Action{Bitvavo.Net.Objects.Options.BitvavoOptions})
member.summary: Add services such as the IBitvavoRestClient and IBitvavoSocketClient. Services will be configured based on the provided options.
member.param: Set options for the Bitvavo services

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.Bind_BitvavoOptions(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.Object)
member.summary: Attempts to bind the given object instance to configuration values by matching property names against configuration keys recursively.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.TryGetConfigurationValue(Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,System.String,System.String@)
member.summary: Tries to get the configuration value for the specified key.

member.name: M:Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.Binder.SourceGeneration.BindingExtensions.ValidateConfigurationKeys(System.Type,System.Lazy{System.Collections.Generic.HashSet{System.String}},Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.IConfiguration,Microsoft.Extensions.Configuration.BinderOptions)
member.summary: If required by the binder options, validates that there are no unknown keys in the input configuration object.
